title: Pattern Bracelet Band
description: A bead-stringing pattern game where kids continue color sequences to finish a bracelet.
learningGoals: Recognize AB, ABC, and ABB color patterns
Extend a craft pattern by one or two beads
Connect screen patterning to real-world bead and pasta crafts
interactionModel: pattern-continue tap the next bead color to string it
feedbackModel: Correct beads fly into the bracelet and sparkle; misses wiggle gently with a spoken nudge and retry.

modes.title: String the Beads
modes.skill: AB, ABC, and ABB bead-pattern extension

credits: Swatch placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
